message:
bd-2q3f.3: add CGA geometric object types for intersection queries

Implements CGA point, line segment, circle, and rectangle types with:
- CgaPoint: distance calculation between points
- CgaLineSegment: intersection, closest point, distance to point
- CgaCircle: point containment, line segment intersection (0/1/2 points)
- CgaRect: point containment, segment intersection, edge access

Key features:
- Handles degenerate cases (parallel lines, tangent circles, zero-length segments)
- 14 tests covering intersection edge cases
- Foundation for replacing ad-hoc geometric computations in edge routing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
